hero.sub: Discover an exclusive selection of luxury residences, contemporary villas, and prestige penthouses in Douala and Yaounde.
hero.selectionDesc: A rigorous selection of the finest addresses in Cameroon, managed under exclusive mandate by our firm.

services.desc: CK Immobilier SARL redefines the standards of exceptional real estate in Cameroon. We combine legal rigor, systematic land title verification, and absolute discretion.
services.statDesc: Every file undergoes a prior ownership audit with the land conservatories of Douala and Yaounde.
services.service1_desc: Exclusive access to prestige properties preserved from public advertising. Support under non-disclosure agreement (NDA) for VIP buyers and institutional investors.
services.service2_desc: Rigorous land title audit at land conservation, tax optimization, high-value asset valuation and luxury rental management in Douala and Yaounde.
services.service3_desc: Comprehensive 360° support: direct negotiation with the owner without intermediary surcharge, organization of secure private visits and notarial assistance.

home.ctaTitle: Do you wish to entrust the sale or search of an exceptional property?
home.ctaSub: Our senior experts are at your disposal for a confidential project study within 24 hours.

property.titleGuaranteeDesc: This property has undergone prior ownership verification at the competent land conservatory.
property.notFoundDesc: The requested property is no longer available or has been moved.

team.title: CK Immobilier Management
team.sub: Exceptional guidance under the strategic direction of Mr. Colbert Kouatcho.
team.excellenceDesc: Every property under mandate undergoes systematic prior legal audit at the land conservatories.
team.confidentialityDesc: Scrupulous respect for the anonymity of our buyers and sellers under confidentiality agreements.
team.anchoringDesc: Direct coverage of both capitals at Carrefour Golf (Yaounde) and Carrefour Bassong (Douala).
team.founderBio: Founder and visionary of CK Immobilier SARL. Over 15 years of expertise in land security, systematic verification of Land Titles, exclusive mandates, and luxury real estate asset management in Cameroon.

contact.title: Contact & Private Appointment
contact.sub: Our firm welcomes you in strict confidence at our Yaounde headquarters (Carrefour Golf) and Douala agency (Carrefour Bassong, Logpom).
contact.messagePlaceholder: Please specify your expectations (budget, geographic sector, special criteria)...
contact.successDesc: One of our senior associates will get back to you within 24 hours to arrange a confidential meeting.

footer.companyDesc: Accredited real estate company in Cameroon (MINHDU). Expertise and transaction of prestige properties in Yaounde and Douala.
